# Temple of Heal — llms.txt
# Machine-readable site description for AI and LLM systems
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

# About
Temple of Heal is a wellness marketplace platform connecting individuals with
verified wellness professionals including coaches, therapists, yoga teachers,
meditation guides, and healing practitioners.

# Primary URL
https://templeofheal.com

# What we offer
- Individual counselling and psychotherapy (virtual and in-person)
- Life coaching, NLP coaching, performance coaching
- Yoga classes and yoga teacher training
- Meditation and mindfulness sessions
- Massage therapy (in-person)
- Wellness retreats (multi-day immersive programs)
- Group workshops and community circles
- AI-powered professional matching
- Secure booking and Stripe payments

# Who we serve
1. Seekers / End Users: Individuals looking for healing, growth, therapy, or wellness support
2. Service Providers: Coaches, therapists, yoga teachers, healers, and practitioners wanting to list their services

# Trust signals
- 50+ verified professionals
- 4.9/5 average rating
- 500+ sessions booked
- All providers are credential-verified and background-checked
- Tier system: Silver, Gold, Platinum based on performance

# Session types
- Virtual (online video)
- In-person
- Both (practitioner offers either)

# Key pages
/ — Homepage with full session discovery, expert spotlight, testimonials
/#find-session — Browse all session categories and search practitioners
/#our-experts — View all verified practitioners
/#testimonials — Client reviews with verified booking badges
/#faq — Frequently asked questions
/sitemap.xml — Full XML sitemap

# Contact
hello@templeofheal.com
+1 (416) 555-0192

# Social
Instagram: https://instagram.com/templeofheal
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/templeofheal
Facebook: https://facebook.com/templeofheal
YouTube: https://youtube.com/@templeofheal

# CMS
Content is managed via /admin/ — a self-contained CMS admin panel.
Service listings include required/optional booking fields and required/optional
provider document uploads defined per service type.

# Keywords
wellness, coaching, therapy, yoga, meditation, healing, NLP, counselling,
mindfulness, retreat, massage therapy, holistic health, mental health,
personal growth, energy healing, inner peace, professional guidance
